versions.summary: Security and release hygiene pass for the public-test stack.
highlights: Public-test configs and generated debug bundles are kept local by default.
Server request parsing now has tighter body limits and multipart uploads disabled globally.
Security-question password reset is opt-in instead of public by default.
Crash bundles redact sensitive JSON configuration keys.
Launcher updates validate manifest URLs and managed file paths before writing or deleting files.

versions.summary: Public website, UCP pages, admin surface, and calendar/event workflows became visible.
highlights: Public website added account-aware sign-in, event calendar, creator contact, and legal pages.
UCP site gained account, security, character, forum badge, and support-ticket flows.
Admin panel gained staff roles, whitelist applications, moderation cases, tickets, and event management.
Discord update announcements can post repository changes to a configured channel.

versions.summary: UCP accounts and selected characters were connected to game login and persistent profile IDs.
highlights: Game play sessions resolve to selected UCP characters.
Character names can be finalized from RaceMenu through the UCP API.
Duplicate account sessions are detected during login.
Disconnect and timeout announcements were added for better in-world feedback.

versions.summary: Initial public-test helpers, launch scripts, packaging scripts, and readiness checks were introduced.
highlights: Public-test preflight, config apply, port-opening, and background server scripts were added.
Client launcher and package publishing helpers were staged.
Crash collection and readiness documentation were started.
Local gamemode and staged server/client settings were prepared for first closed testing.
